channel.title: Systems on Robert Akhmerov | v31dt
channel.description: Recent content in Systems on Robert Akhmerov | v31dt

item.title: Creativity Needs Structure
item.description:
This is the second part of a connected pair of posts. The first one is about learning through systems.

I used to think about creativity as something that happens when structure disappears. The more freedom, the more original the result. That sounds attractive, but I do not think it is true anymore.

Total freedom is often not creative. It can become vague. If there are no constraints, there is nothing to push against, no direction, and no reason to choose one path over another. A blank page can look like freedom, but it can also be a trap.

item.title: Learning Through Systems
item.description:
This is the first part of a connected pair of posts. This one is about learning. The second one is about creativity.

I do not really believe in relying on motivation as the main engine for getting good. Motivation is useful, but it is unstable. Some days it is there, some days it is not. A system is different. A system gives you a way to keep moving even when the mood is average, the task is repetitive, or the result is not immediately visible.
